General.Name: 1414 Degrees Ltd
General.GicIndustry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
General.Description: 1414 Degrees Limited engages in developing and commercializing silicon-based thermal storage technology. It offers the SiBox modular product, which uses thermal energy storage SiBrick to provide industrial high-temperature heat from electricity and biogas. The company was formerly known as Latent Heat Storage Pty Ltd. 1414 Degrees Limited was founded in 2008 and is based in Tonsley, Australia.
